recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Sound of My Voice
recommendations.overview: A journalist and his girlfriend get pulled in while they investigate a cult whose leader claims to be from the future.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: The Pale Blue Eye

recommendations.title: The Girl by the Lake
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates the murder of a beautiful teen girl left naked by a lake.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: Detective Chinatown
recommendations.overview: After being rejected from the police college, a mannerly man travels to Bangkok where he and an energetic distant relative must solve a murder case.
